name: STMix
description: Four-channel stereo mixer in 6HP. Per-channel attenuator with L-to-R mono normalization · unattenuated stereo AUX post-fader input · DC-coupled for CV mixing · rear header chains to Hexmix master.

controls.name: Channel Level
controls.description: Manual attenuator for each stereo channel pair. Controls both L and R of the channel together.

inputs.name: L(M) IN 1-4
inputs.description: Left / mono input per channel. When R of the same channel is unpatched the L signal is duplicated onto R, so mono sources mix into the stereo bus.
inputs.normalizedTo: routed to the same channel's R bus when R IN is unpatched

inputs.name: R IN 1-4
inputs.description: Right input per channel. Patching R breaks the L-to-R normalization on that channel, giving true stereo.

inputs.name: AUX L
inputs.description: Stereo auxiliary input, left side. Sums straight to the L output bus with no attenuation and after the channel faders.
inputs.normalizedTo: routed to AUX R bus when AUX R is unpatched

inputs.name: AUX R
inputs.description: Stereo auxiliary input, right side. Sums straight to the R output bus with no attenuation.

outputs.name: OUT L
outputs.description: Left channel of the stereo mix sum. Clip LED lights on signal and reddens near headroom.

outputs.name: OUT R
outputs.description: Right channel of the stereo mix sum. Clip LED lights on signal and reddens near headroom.

behaviors.name: Mono-to-stereo upmix per channel
behaviors.trigger: L(M) IN patched with the matching R IN unpatched
behaviors.description: Each channel's L jack normalizes to its R when R is empty, so mono voices land centred in the stereo image. Patching R on any channel leaves that channel true-stereo while neighbours still upmix mono.

behaviors.name: Unattenuated AUX post-fader
behaviors.trigger: signal patched to AUX L / AUX R
behaviors.description: The AUX pair bypasses every channel fader and sums straight into the output bus at unity. Use for a fifth input, a chain-in from another STMix or a dry return that must not be attenuated by a misplaced fader.

behaviors.name: DC-coupled CV mixing
behaviors.trigger: patching CV or offsets into channel inputs
behaviors.description: All inputs are DC coupled, so STMix works as a 4+1 CV summer with attenuation per input. Mix LFOs, envelopes and offsets at any rate; the AUX pair adds two more unity-gain summing jacks on top.

behaviors.name: Hexmix submix expansion
behaviors.trigger: 2×3 ribbon cable from STMix rear header to Hexmix
behaviors.description: The rear six-pin header taps the STMix stereo sum into the Hexmix master section. Keeps the front-panel OUT jacks free while STMix acts as a dedicated four-channel stereo subgroup feeding the Hexmix bus.

behaviors.name: Clip LEDs on the output
behaviors.description: Red LEDs on OUT L and OUT R indicate signal presence and clip. Use them to back off individual channel faders until peaks stop reddening — needed because there is no master level on STMix itself.

behaviors.name: No master fader
behaviors.description: STMix has only per-channel attenuators, no overall gain. Set final listening level downstream (OUT module, interface) or via the channel faders themselves. Chain into Hexmix when a master is needed.

patchIdeas.name: Four mono voices into stereo
patchIdeas.patch: Four mono VCOs → CH1-CH4 L(M) inputs, R jacks empty · each channel auto-upmixes to centred stereo · fader per voice · OUT L/R → master out · dense four-voice centre mix with one cable per voice
patchIdeas.diagram:
STMix:
* CH 1-4: Level to taste

VCO 1:
VCO 2:
VCO 3:
VCO 4:

- VCO 1 (Out) -> STMix (L(M) IN 1)
- VCO 2 (Out) -> STMix (L(M) IN 2)
- VCO 3 (Out) -> STMix (L(M) IN 3)
- VCO 4 (Out) -> STMix (L(M) IN 4)
- STMix (OUT L) -> Output (L)
- STMix (OUT R) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Stereo FX in, dry on AUX
patchIdeas.patch: CH1-CH3 feed voices into the mix · CH4 stereo = wet return from a reverb send · dry sum of the voices → AUX L/R to sit at unity behind the wet channel · fade CH4 to dial wet/dry without touching the voices
patchIdeas.diagram:
STMix:
* CH 1-3: voices
* CH 4: wet return

VCO 1:
VCO 2:
VCO 3:
Reverb:
Mult:

- VCO 1 (Out) -> STMix (L(M) IN 1)
- VCO 2 (Out) -> STMix (L(M) IN 2)
- VCO 3 (Out) -> STMix (L(M) IN 3)
- Mult (Sum L) -> Reverb (In L) // dry send
- Mult (Sum R) -> Reverb (In R)
- Reverb (Out L) -> STMix (L(M) IN 4)
- Reverb (Out R) -> STMix (R IN 4)
- Mult (Sum L) -> STMix (AUX L) // dry unity
- Mult (Sum R) -> STMix (AUX R)

patchIdeas.name: CV summing bus
patchIdeas.patch: Four modulation sources (LFO, envelope, random, offset) → CH1-CH4 L(M) · faders scale each contribution · OUT L = composite CV · because inputs are DC-coupled, STMix doubles as a 4-into-1 CV mixer with per-source level and unity AUX for a fifth signal
patchIdeas.diagram:
STMix:
* CH 1-4: Level = mix amount per source

LFO:
Envelope:
Random:
Offset:
Extra CV:

- LFO (Out) >> STMix (L(M) IN 1)
- Envelope (Out) >> STMix (L(M) IN 2)
- Random (Out) >> STMix (L(M) IN 3)
- Offset (Out) >> STMix (L(M) IN 4)
- Extra CV (Out) >> STMix (AUX L) // unity
- STMix (OUT L) >> Filter (Cutoff) // composite CV

patchIdeas.name: Chain two STMix for 8 stereo channels
patchIdeas.patch: STMix A inputs host voices 1-4 · STMix A OUT L/R → STMix B AUX L/R (unity, post-fader safe) · STMix B hosts voices 5-8 on its channels · STMix B OUT = full 8-channel stereo sum · no master fader loss on either bank
patchIdeas.diagram:
STMix A:
* CH 1-4: voices 1-4

STMix B:
* CH 1-4: voices 5-8

- STMix A (OUT L) -> STMix B (AUX L) // unity cascade
- STMix A (OUT R) -> STMix B (AUX R)
- STMix B (OUT L) -> Output (L) // 8-channel sum
- STMix B (OUT R) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Drum submix to Hexmix
patchIdeas.patch: Kick, snare, hat, clap on CH1-CH4 (use R for stereo hats/claps) · rear ribbon → Hexmix master section · drum bus folds into Hexmix without burning channels there · front OUT L/R stay free for a separate monitor feed
patchIdeas.diagram:
STMix:
* CH 1-4: drum levels

Kick:
Snare:
Hat L:
Hat R:
Clap L:
Clap R:

- Kick (Out) -> STMix (L(M) IN 1)
- Snare (Out) -> STMix (L(M) IN 2)
- Hat L (Out) -> STMix (L(M) IN 3)
- Hat R (Out) -> STMix (R IN 3) // stereo hats
- Clap L (Out) -> STMix (L(M) IN 4)
- Clap R (Out) -> STMix (R IN 4)
- STMix (OUT L) -> Monitor (L) // front-panel monitor
- STMix (OUT R) -> Monitor (R)
